description: Two integrations sharing ONE connector, each exposing BOTH the Fetch Issues and Threat Intelligence & Enrichment (feed) capabilities and ONE passthrough auth profile (add-handler path). The 'github' connector already carries the first migrated handler (xsoar-github, integration 'GitHub') whose connection.yaml has a single passthrough profile and whose capabilities.yaml/configurations.yaml expose the fetch-issues_github + threat-intelligence-and-enrichment_github sub-capabilities (see input/connectors/github/). This run generates the SECOND integration ('GitHub IAM') which ALSO declares one passthrough auth method plus fetch (isfetch) and feed (feed) capabilities, so the generator appends a second handler (xsoar-github-iam), merges its single passthrough profile into the same connection.yaml, and registers its fetch-issues_github-iam + threat-intelligence-and-enrichment_github-iam sub-capabilities. The golden must show both handlers each contributing one auth profile and both fetch+feed capabilities, with globally-unique connection field ids that round-trip through each handler's serializer.yaml field_mappings and per-profile triggers that reference the resolved ids.
